summary: SLA113 Iteration 16 testing complete. All NEW features working: Audio Forge Engine (real AI-enhanced DSP via GPT-4o-mini), Build Pipeline HTML5/PixiJS compilation with real zip download, Admin Control Vault (ArtTech Nexus Generator + Matrix Parameters). Fixed a bug in compile_build where vision_assets had inconsistent data structures. Backend: 18/18 tests pass. Frontend: All features verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in compile_build: vision_assets can have inconsistent structures (dict vs list, nested 'asset' key, error objects) - added defensive handling
Audio Forge uses GPT-4o-mini for AI DSP parameter generation - falls back gracefully if AI unavailable
Build Pipeline generates real HTML5/PixiJS game bundles with index.html, game.js, game.json, assets/manifest.json, and logic specs
Zip files are stored as base64 in MongoDB for download - consider file storage for large builds
ArtTech Nexus returns 8 pipeline archetypes with color-coded tags
Matrix Parameters returns 5 engine configs (physics, audio, render, biome, archetype) with FModel utility status

test_credentials.note: No auth required for /sla113 - SLA113 dashboard is accessible without login

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed audio assets during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: SLA113 Iteration 16 adds: 1) Audio Forge Engine at /api/sla113/audio/* with real AI-enhanced DSP (GPT-4o-mini generates EQ bands, compression, spatial params), 2) Build Pipeline compile at /api/sla113/builds/{id}/compile creates real HTML5/PixiJS zip bundles, 3) Admin Control Vault with /api/sla113/nexus/pipelines (8 archetypes), /api/sla113/nexus/matrix (engine params), /api/sla113/nexus/os-modules (8 FModel mappings). Fixed compile_build bug handling inconsistent vision_assets data structures.

backend_api.notes: Returns 6 audio types, 4 engines, template DSP params
Generates audio asset with AI-enhanced DSP, waveform data, physical modeling
Creates build in 'queued' status with 5 stages
Compiles HTML5/PixiJS zip bundle, sets download_url
Returns valid zip file with game files
Returns 8 pipeline archetypes with tags and colors
Returns 5 engine params and fmodel_utility status

frontend_ui.notes: Title input, audio type selector (6 types), engine selector (4 engines), DSP sliders, Forge Audio Asset button all working
Shows waveform visualization, duration, sample rate, bit depth, channels, AI-enhanced DSP (EQ bands, compression)
Project select, target format buttons, optimization buttons, Initialize Build button, build queue with Compile AAA and Download ZIP
8 pipeline cards with color-coded tags, OS Module Functional Map table with 8 rows
5 engine param cards with icons, FModel Utility Status panel, Compilation Readiness gradient bar

bug_fixed.issue: compile_build crashed with AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get' when vision_assets contained inconsistent data structures
bug_fixed.root_cause: vision_assets can have: 1) assets as dict instead of list, 2) nested {'asset': {...}} structure, 3) error objects {'error': '...'}
bug_fixed.fix: Added defensive handling to check types, handle nested structures, and skip error objects

mocked_apis.notes: Audio Forge uses real GPT-4o-mini for AI DSP generation (falls back gracefully). Build Pipeline generates real HTML5/PixiJS bundles.
